chunks.text: Course: EE 24 | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 24. Freshman Seminar Catalog Description: The Freshman Seminar Program has been designed to provide new students with the opportunity to explore an intellectual topic with a faculty member in a small seminar setting. Freshman seminars are offered in all campus departments, and topics may vary from department to department and semester to semester. Units: 1 Also Offered As: ELENG 24 Formats: Fall: 1 hour of seminar per week Spring: 1 hour of seminar per week Grading Basis: Student Option Final Exam Status: Yes Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
